introSection: Jet Sleigh was a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Fushimi Momoyama Castle Land in Kyoto, Kyoto, Japan. It closed with the park on January 31, 2003.
fullText: Jet Sleigh was a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Fushimi Momoyama Castle Land in Kyoto, Kyoto, Japan. It closed with the park on January 31, 2003.
